reviews.title: Do not stay again
reviews.text: staff scammed my money. and I called agoda for help. but both agoda and hotel rejected refund. besides, no  free water, poor service, and nothing to do around hotel.  You can find better hotel at same price. not stay again

reviews.title: Stay away.
reviews.positives: Location for me was central in a walkable neighborhood. Hotel had a working elevator. Front desk attendant helped me with my 55 kg of luggage in four bags. What you read below is responsible for the rating of 3 / poor.
reviews.negatives: Middle aged female attendant emerged from the back when I asked for a night time restaurant recommendation for noodles and vegetables where someone would interpret the menu so I could order. She insisted I take a tuk-tuk to her recommended restaurant for 60,000 dong return. The tuk-tuk driver, who spoke English, took me to a restaurant around the corner from the hotel, about 200 steps at most, and left me there. It was unknown to me what was on the menu so I acquired a package of biscuits at a local convenience store and walked the scenic route in the dark back to the hotel. The tuk tuk drove by closely and swiftly so the wheels could spray me with accumulated street water while the driver hurled expletives. He couldn't get paid unless a round trip was involved and I didn't need a ride for 200 steps. As I told the hotel, I needed a restaurant that would assist me in ordering from a Vietnamese language menu. Before arriving, I thought it would be interesting to spend a couple of days and explore. If Ha Tien city had once been an important connection between the mainland and Cambodia or Phu Quoc it appeared the glory days were over and the local merchants and suppliers wanted customers to feel their pain.

reviews.title: You get what you pay for
reviews.text: Nylon bedding, no duvet cover on the duvet, we paid less for a room in Hue which was far superior. Towels discoloured and bath mat dirty. The sink is so small you cannot wash properly as the glass shelf sits directly  above.  Dreadful

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives:
Nice staff. Good location,, but Ha Tien not with a stop.
Shower good, light airy room. Good wifi .
reviews.negatives: Bed was like a hard board, pillows extra large and hard. Very uncomfortable.

reviews.title: Basic
reviews.text: Basic budget accommodation and not near the ferry as someone here stated.

reviews.title: Loved this place!
reviews.positives: Excellent location. Helpful staff, clean room, great AC, good hot water in shower. Tv with Netflix and other channels. Good linen and towels. Elevator and new look! Close to river walk, restaurants, coffee shops. Markets nearby.
reviews.negatives: No swimming pool! Guess you can’t have it all!

reviews.title: Pretty good except for the bed
reviews.text: Blanket and pillows were smelly. The rest is great.

reviews.title: Great place to stay in Phu Quoc with reasonable price and great services.
reviews.positives: The hotel staff were very polite and useful. They even helped me buy tickets for different attractions with better prices. Thank you.

reviews.title: Clean, beautiful
reviews.text: Deserving of a good rating.

reviews.title: Excellent 🙌
reviews.positives:
Good location and clean. 
The management and staffs are very kind and friendly.

reviews.title: Hà Tiên, the gateway to Vietnam, near the market.
reviews.text: Entering from Kampot, a convenient city to access the Mekong Delta. I stay for one night to see the town. Behind the hotel, there is a market with freshly caught seafood lined up. There are also plenty of eateries. The hotel isn't very spacious, but it's sufficiently roomy. Overall, I had no issues staying there. The hot water supply was fine. Being a border town, it feels a bit pricier, but it's within an acceptable range.

reviews.title: Good value for your money. My family will stay in this hotel again after returning from Phủ Quốc island
reviews.positives: Location is closed to Ha Tiền night market, near a lot of restaurants and the street food vendors. It’s also closed to the ferry terminal and bus terminal
reviews.negatives: The hotel reception is very friendly and helpful

reviews.title: Good to stay
reviews.text: The small mini hotel near the river and market offers motorcycles for rent to travel around.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Good value for money. Very clean and the owner is very kind and helpful
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Clean and quiet
reviews.text: This hotel had good beds and was clean. The staff is really helpful and you can rent a scooter for a ok price. It was a nice stay in this little town

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Great big room. Very clean. Good location and really friendly helpful staff. They helped us with money exchange, onwards travel and breakfast. Ha Tien was a nice place to explore, lively night market and loads of great street food

reviews.title: Clean, New, Good Location
reviews.text: If you would like to go to Phu Quoc, this place is good for you.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Cheap and service excellent

reviews.title: Overnight in Ha Tien
reviews.text:
Clean spacious room 
Comfortable bed
Upgraded room 
Close to riverside and dining options 
Very kind staff 
Good wifi

reviews.title: Cumplió mis expectativas
reviews.positives: Era solo para pasar una noche y cumplió mis expectativas
reviews.negatives: Nada

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
The good: The room was larger than normal for the price and upon entry was very clean.  The staff leapt at any request without hesitation.  The back of the building has all the markets in town so you won’t need transport to get your goodies


The bad:  outside of the hotels control, my neighboring room (local Vietnamese) partied until 4:00am, even after pounding on the wall it continued.
The room had a pretty bad ant problem and the pillows were 4” foam that didn’t compress, I used the extra blanket as my pillow.  I didn’t get much sleep.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: La ubicación

reviews.title: Happy with Happy Hotel
reviews.text: This little hotel is special; pleasant and helpful staff in a clean modern hotel that is in a great location surrounded by many restaurants and cafes.

reviews.title: Sitio tranquilo para descansar
reviews.positives: Me gustó todo, sobre todo la persona de la recepción es super amable, me trato super bien y me ayudó en todo lo que podía. Gracias 🙏

reviews.title: Excellent location
reviews.text: Great travel option. Close to everything, but far enough from water to not be too loud. Rented us motorbike & did laundry at reasonable rate. Clean room, great value. That said, it happened to be very  loud this night as the hotel is across from a bus waiting lot and 50+ high school local kids were partying hard, and loud, and drunk into the night. But, can't hold that against the hotel.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Hôtel très bruyant

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Perfect for a pit stop. Spacious rooms which are clean.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: La chambre est spacieuse
reviews.negatives:
A notre arrivée on a voulu nous emmener dans un autre hôtel pour un tarif plus élevé... nous avons refusé et avons eu notre chambre.
Le staff ne parle pas anglais, utilisation de Google translate. 
Pas de rideaux occultants
Pour info, la rue est en travaux plus de trottoirs...

reviews.title: Good location
reviews.text: Good location with lots of options for dinner and the ferry. Friendly staff that assisted with organizing taxis and gave directions to good eateries.

reviews.title: Un hôtel pas cher mais correct pour une nuit d’étape
reviews.positives: Confortable pour le prix et bien situé.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: New room, clean, with hot and cold water.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
L'unique membre du personnel qui parle anglais est vraiment d'une aide précieuse, merci!
Situation idéale.
reviews.negatives: Aucune insonorisation avec la chambre d'à côté, nous n'avons pas pu dormir avant tard dans la nuit à cause des voisins...

reviews.title: Clean and cheap.
reviews.text: Close to market. Very close to ferry terminal if your going to Phu Wuoc.

reviews.title: Ha Tiên ne vaut que pour sa proximité avec le Cambodge et ses ferrys pour Phu Quoc ! Néanmoins une jolie balade vers Hon
reviews.positives: La propreté des chambres.
reviews.negatives:
L’âpreté, l’indifférence et l’antipathie des gérants et du personnel.
Les discussions bruyantes et sans fin à des heures indues ! 
Aucun service.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: I stayed here for a night while cycling through the region. The room was clean and comfortable and the staff was accommodating and a pleasure to deal with. I was able to store my bicycle safely inside the lobby. I would stay here again.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Chambre spacieuse, bien équipée (climatisation, bureau, miroir, table de chevet).
Bien situé pour faire une rapide étape avant de partir au Cambodge.
reviews.negatives:
Peu d'insonorisation. Nous étions dans une chambre au 1er étage et nous entendions le bruit de la réception, ainsi que les clients des autres chambres (qui étaient très bruyants). Difficile de s'endormir correctement et nous étions réveillées tôt le matin par du bruit également.
Il ne faut pas espérer faire de grasse matinée dans cet hôtel car il y a également des travaux devant l'hôtel ou ils font un trottoir tout au long de la route. Mais cela ne nous a pas dérangé car   nous nous levions tôt.

reviews.title: Good Hotel
reviews.text: I had a quite a big room with a king size bed. It was clean and everything works. The staff is very helpful and supported me with all my requests for laundry, bicycle rental, late checkout and a free ride to the bus station. I recommend this Hotel!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: C’était bien situé!
reviews.negatives: Pas de fenêtre dans la chambre.

reviews.title: Good, clean accomodation
reviews.text:
The room was clean, we only stayed one night but it was a pleasant stay.
Good thing to note that there is a lift in the building, which comes in handy when traveling with heavy bags.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: La gérante est très serviable.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: No complaint here. Clean hotel in a good location with a team of helpful staffs.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Largement suffisant pour une nuit avant de prendre le ferry.

reviews.title: Good value for the money
reviews.text:
Great location, close to the ferry port, city centre, market and wharf. Our room was clean, airy bright, and comfortable. No complaints on that. It was worth the money. The hotel was walking distance to all sorts restaurants and shops. 

The market that was close by had great fruit, some street food, and souvenirs. 
But beware, the market closes up around 6:45-7:00, and it gets a bit sketchy.

reviews.title: Étape au retour de Phu Quov
reviews.positives: La gentillesse de la dame à l'accueil. L'emplacement
reviews.negatives: Pas de ménage sur 2 nuits et donc pas d'eau non plus. Matelas dur. Mais vu le prix c'est vite oublié

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The staff were friendly and helpful. And the location was close to everything so I do recommend giving this hotel a try :)

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Il y avait toutes les commodités nécessaires.
Très bon rapport qualité-prix.
Nous étions juste de passage. L'hôtel n'est pas loin de la station de ferry pour Phuc Quoc
reviews.negatives: Il manque un peu d'insonorisation. On entend bien la rue.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Very good for location, room & service , car parking ...

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Établissement agréable, direction très à l'écoute, piscine propre. Passé un bon moment je recommande

reviews.title: Perfect stay for transit into Cambodia
reviews.text: The staff were very friendly and helpful, especially when they knew we were going to for a border run, they gave us their contact details in case anything went wrong. The room itself was simple and clean, but had all we needed for an overnight stay and we were comfortable. Lots of massage and food nearby, and very near the port too. Would stay here again if transiting!

reviews.title: Ok pour une nuit
reviews.positives: La chambre est propre et la salle de bain est bien. Le personnel est gentil. Ils m’ont trouvé un taxi pour aller prendre le ferry le matin très rapidement
reviews.negatives: J’ai eu une chambre fumeur qui sentait très fort le tabac froid. La climatisation ne marchait pas.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The new room is clean, I will come again next time.

reviews.title: cool
reviews.positives: Bon hotel pour faire une nuit avant de passer la frontière ou de prendre le ferry direction Phu Quoc. Sinon c'est pas exceptionnel.
reviews.negatives: rien c'est juste OK

reviews.title: Wonderful
reviews.text: The room is beautiful, I booked a 2-bed room and upon receiving it, it felt like having 2 separate rooms, really wonderful. The grounds are clean and beautiful, and the staff are very enthusiastic. Everything is great, it's an ideal place for a vacation. You should choose it, everyone!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
La chambre était propre mais malheureusement il y avait des fourmis dans la salle de bain. Nous l'avons signalé à l'accueil et ils ont tout de suite réagi en mettant du spray anti insectes. La climatisation fonctionnait et la literie était plutôt confortable. 
Nous avons été super bien accueillies par la réceptionniste et conseillées pour le passage de frontière. L'hôtel propose un accompagnement "package bus et passage de frontière" pour faciliter ce trajet.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The staff is very enthusiastic. The room is clean.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: . Rapport qualité prix exellent
reviews.negatives: Chambre simple sans fenetre

reviews.title: Super helpful staff!!
reviews.text: Went well above and beyond what was required. I lost my debit card and they brought me to the bank once I figured I could paypal myself money that way, and pretty much successfully did the whole thing for me and brought me back…within maybe 2 hours of me arriving. Would recommend to anyone staying in town.

reviews.title: Super la personne a la réception
reviews.positives: L’accueil

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Good

reviews.title: Très bon emplacement et chambres avec bacon moderne!
reviews.positives: Très bon emplacement dans le quartier des marchés et des restos. Pas loin des embarcadères et de la station de bus Futa. Chambre avec balcon sur l'avant avec belle vue sur la large rue assez calme. Chambre moderne et assez spacieuse. Possibilité de louer des scooters à l'hôtel pour 160000d par jour. Frontière avec le Cambodge à moins de 10 kms. Personnel assez sympa, mais pensez au traducteur ;-)
reviews.negatives: Pas de déjeuner proposé. Pas de bouilloire électrique. Carte de crédit non acceptée!

reviews.title: Excellent family owned hotel
reviews.text:
Trips organized by the hotel.
Staff are brilliant. Location perfect close market and ATM.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Si hôtel si tu es proche du centre
reviews.negatives: Vu les problèmes électriques de temps à autre le groupe électrogène se met en route et cela fait un peu de bruit n'oubliez pas de fermer les portes

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Super clean, the staff is super friendly. Recommended

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: La chambre est confortable, mais un peu petite pour 4 personnes. Le personnel est très agréable. Possibilité d'organiser les trajets sur place, notamment le passage avec la frontière cambodgienne.

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text: We really enjoyed our stay at this hotel. It has seen better days but it still feels classy. It is in a great location, and the staff is very friendly and helpful for booking trips or anything you might need. We took a great trip to the floating markets through them, was a fair deal and a great time. Highy recommend this hotel! great staff!

reviews.title: Très content.
reviews.positives: L'hôtel est très bien situé, beaucoup de restaurants dans les environs.

reviews.title: Newer Clean Helpful
reviews.text:
Everyone went out of their way to make my stay as easy as possilbe.  Very good staff and good English.
Thank you I will return.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Personnel dispo. Arrivée a 13hoo location moto bike a 14hoo. Chambre très grande. Et Nickel
reviews.negatives: Ras

reviews.title: very good
reviews.text:
staff is very Nice!
the homestay is nearly ton center..
bikes are good quality

reviews.title: Grande satisfaction
reviews.positives: Un hôtel à recommander vraiment ! Tout a été parfait ! On nous a réservé un bus pour Vinh long et assuré le parfait déroulement de notre voyage ! L’accueil et le professionnalisme sont à souligner
reviews.negatives: Rien

reviews.title: Cosiest bed we've had yet!
reviews.text:
We stayed here for one night before leaving for phu quoc. Super clean and comfy room, good location, nice bathroom, friendly, helpful staff. 
Was hard to find because it blended in with some other hotels, and the locals were sending us all over ha tien looking for it! Really recommend for a nice relaxing stay.

reviews.title: Top
reviews.positives: Le personnel est extraordinaire, mention spéciale pour Lung qui a organisé notre transfert pour le Cambodge

reviews.title: Buen hotel a buen precio
reviews.text: Chicas de recepción muy atentas y serviciales

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Emplacement idéal. Le logement est très propre, quasiment neuf. Il n'y avait pas beaucoup de lumière naturelle dans notre chambre mais cela ne nous a pas dérangés. Le personnel est gentil. Ils nous ont loué des scooters et lavé le linge. Tout se fait à pied mais on peut aller en scooter à la plage et en Tuk tuk électrique au night market. Très bon rapport qualité prix.
reviews.negatives: Rien

reviews.title: gran opción ...
reviews.text: las dos hermanas de recepción muy agradables y serviciales ... muy cómodo muy bien ubicado y todo ok ...

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Lit très très confortable et hôtel moderne.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Calidad-precio estupendo. Ubicado cerca del puente. Se oye bastante el ruido de la calle y de la gente que está en el hotel, y empezaban pronto por la mañana, aunque por la noche habia silencio. La habitación espaciosa y limpia; te limpian la habitación. Cama dura. Desayuno algo caro para lo que es, pero no encontramos nada cerca fuera de lo que es desayuno vitnamita. Pudimos alquilar moto allí mismo. 
Personal atento.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Très bon accueil 🙂

reviews.title: Bien mais surprise lors du check out
reviews.text:
Bien mais dommage que l'hôtel ne précise pas que l'eau en bouteille présente dans la chambre est payante, d'où la surprise au moment de payer.
Le personnel est très agréable.

reviews.title: Excellent hôtel
reviews.positives: Excellent accueil. Gentillesse du personnel, serviable et efficace. Grande chambre, lumineuse, confortable. Propreté impeccable. Proche du marché. Propose un transfert pour le Cambodge et peut aussi faire le change de devises.
reviews.negatives: Il y a peu de prises électriques (seulement 2). Une bouilloire et 2 tasses seraient bien.

reviews.title: Séjour en passage de l’An
reviews.text: En effet , je suis tombé  plein périodes du passage l’An et voulant rester quelques de plus cela n’était pas possible et des travaux en annexe sans cela il y a rien à dire au point de vu de la propreté à revenir dans les meilleurs moments

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Accueil très chaleureux, la propriétaire de l'hôtel nous a aidé pour prendre le bateau vers Hai tac et conseillé, en prime petit cours de langue. Emplacement top.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
bon emplacement 
chambre très simple
literie toujours aussi dure

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Très bon rapport qualité prix, la chambre était propre grande avec une petite terrasse AC et tout ça qu'il faut pour s'y sentir bien. Mais le gros plus c'est l'accueil et l'aide que nous avons reçus de la part du personnel. Ils nous ont organisé notre trajet en bus pour le Cambodge (et le prix proposé était bien moindre que ceux proposés par d'autres prestataires à la gare routière !), répondus à l'ensemble de nos questions et même offert des bouteilles d'eau ! Bref on a passé un très bon séjour et on remercie l'ensemble du personnel pour leur aide précieuse et leur gentillesse !

reviews.title: Simple mais bien pratique
reviews.text:
Hotel economique classique tres depouille dans le style asiatique mais l'essentiel y est, et bien localise pres du centre et pas trop loin de la gare routiere et du depart ferry pour Phu Quoc.
le personnel parle anglais et pour un supplement modique j'ai pu avoir un petit dejeuner, servi dans la chambre.
Une bonne adresse dans cette ville frontiere, finalement plutot sympathique.
Attention, les ATM ne sont pas fiables, prevoir des devises, ne serait-ce que pour payer l'hotel sur place.

reviews.title: Chambres propres et confortables.
reviews.positives: Propre, confortable, excellent rapport qualité prix.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
Super chambre, spacieuse et propre. Juste une odeur de renfermé à notre arrivée.
Bon emplacement près des marchés.
De bon conseil pour réserver le bus oiur se rendre à la frontière Cambodgienne. Départ du bus juste à côté.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Sehr nettes Personal. Für eine Nacht ok. Mehr aber auch nicht.
reviews.negatives: Leider waren im ganzen Zimmer (+Bett) Ameisen. Eines der Handtücher war sehr schmutzig und definitiv nicht gewaschen.

reviews.title: Propre, central et à petit prix
reviews.text:
Séjour de 3 nuits dans une chambre grande et agréable.  L’accueil est sympathique et la location de scooter permet de balader un peu car sans cela, HA Tien à peu d’intérêts si ce n’est sont marché pour son atmosphère bien vietnamienne. 
Le lit est dur et il n’y a pas de bouilloire

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Das Zimmer ist sehr sauber und zweckmässig. Wir haben eine Nacht vor dem Grenzübertritt nach Kambodscha dort verbracht, dafür war er optimal.
reviews.negatives:
Es hatte kleine Ameisen im Zimmer. Es war sehr laut bis spät in die Nacht und am Morgen sehr früh wieder und zwar im Hotel und auch in der Umgebung. 
Die Betten und Kopfkissen sind sehr hart und nicht komfortabel.

reviews.title: Très bon séjour à Ha tien
reviews.text: L'hôtel est très bien situé, vous pouvez louer des scooters pour vous balader aux alentours. Les chambres sont simples et équipées. La dame de l'accueil parle anglais et peut vous organiser vos trajets en bus /ferry. Elle est super et à votre écoute. Un grand merci 🤗

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: Zimmer hatte kein Fenster, war bei der Buchung nicht erkennbar

reviews.title: Séjour parfait
reviews.text: Hôtel très propre. Hôtes très sympathiques également. Super petit déjeuner. Très bien situé pour visiter Ha Tien qui mérite vraiment de visiter plusieurs jours.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Zentral gelegen

reviews.title: Sehr nettes Personal
reviews.text: Das Zimmer war sauber und gemütlich eingerichtet. Das Personal sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. Wir waren eine Nacht dort.

reviews.title: Immer wieder
reviews.positives: Die gute Lage

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Die Zimmer waren sehr sauber, das Personal hilfreich, Frühstück wird auf Wunsch geholt,  Roller dort ausleihbar , Zimmer mit Fenster gehen zur Straße,  ohne zum Innenhof, dort vielleicht leiser.

reviews.title: Goede ligging, super behulpzaam personeel
reviews.text:
De ligging van Happy Hotel is perfect. Dicht bij de ferry’s aan de andere kant vh water, rustig gelegen en achter het hotel de markt (goederen, vlees, vis en groente) aan de kade avondmarkt om te eten.
Personeel super super behulpzaam met vragen .
Hotelkamer ruim en schoon, nette badkamer mer goede douche.
Als ik 1 minpuntje moet noemen dan is het het harde bed, maar dat is heel persoonlijk

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Preis/ Leistung einwandfrei , sauber, fuer einige Naechte zu empfehlen
reviews.negatives: Weiss ich nicht?

reviews.title: コストパフォーマンスがよい
reviews.text: 設備等もスッタフ対応も合格点。部屋は小さい吹き抜け側に明り取りがあるだけだったのが少し残念。もう少しお金を出して川沿いの他のホテルにしたほうが良かったかもしれない。夕方から川沿いに海鮮屋台が出るのはよかった。

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Das Zimmer war wie beschrieben und das Personal hilfsbereit.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Good

reviews.title: Gutes Hotel für einen Zwischenstopp in Grenznähe
reviews.positives: Freundlicher Empfang.Eine Rezeptionistin konnte etwas englisch.Sie buchte für uns Bustickets für die Weiterreise nach Kambodscha.Zentrale Lage.Restaurants und Nachtmarkt in der Nähe.Bei Bedarf kann man Scooter im Hotel mieten.
reviews.negatives: Nichts

reviews.title: Ngoài nhân viên lễ tân, 1 người tiếp đón khách với thái độ vô cùng xấc xược. Mặt hất trên trời
reviews.text: Thái độ tiếp đón tệ hại

reviews.title: Wir würden wiederkommen.
reviews.positives: Gutes Preis-Leistungsverhältnis, sehr hilfsbereite Eigentümerfamilie, gute Atmosphäre, zentral gelegen. Wir haben uns sehr wohlgefühlt. Außerdem ist Ha Tien eine gemütliche Stadt mit viel Charakter in wunderschöner Umgebung.
reviews.negatives: Nahe einer verkehrsreichen Straße und einem Busparkplatz. Dennoch unter der Woche, außer an Samstagen nachts relativ ruhig.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Khách sạn nằm dưới chân cầu hơi khó đi, nằm trong dãy nhà nghỉ nên ồn, đến tối 10h vẫn còn nghe tiếng xe máy nẹt pô đua, gối cứng & cao nằm mỏi cổ. Giường đôi nhỏ chừng 1m5 k fai 1m6. Nhưg giá rẻ thì chỉ như vậy thoii. Ưu điểm gần chợ & bến phà

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Super Lage....
Strand nah, Städchen ums Eck...

reviews.title: Hài lòng
reviews.text: Tôi hài lòng về dịch vụ.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Staff premuroso quando capisce, struttura abbastanza pulita
reviews.negatives: Lo staff non parla molto inglese

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Nhân viên nhiệt tình chu đáo

reviews.title: Sicuramente positivo
reviews.positives: Personale della massima disponibilità e gentilezza la signorina che ci ha ricevuto è stata di aiuto per ogni esigenza la ringrazio
reviews.negatives: La camera anche se comoda non è finestrata

reviews.title: Nhận xét Ha Tien Happy Hotel
reviews.text: Nhìn chung tất cả các thứ từ tiện nghi , giá cả , cung cách phục vụ của khách sạn mình đánh giá là tốt , tuy nhiên chỗ đậu xe ô tô riêng của khách sạn thì không có , khách phải tự gửi bãi xe đối diện và phải trả phí . Xe đậu ngoài trời không có mái che rất không tốt khi mùa nắng nóng và mùa mưa

reviews.title: Bella sistemazione ad Ha Tien
reviews.positives:
L’accoglienza è stata molto positiva! La ragazza alla reception parlava bene inglese e ci ha aiutato per l’acquisto dei biglietti del traghetto, per i quali avevamo avuto un problema. La camera era grande e pulita. Possibilità di aggiungere la colazione a circa 3 euro. 
La struttura è situata vicino al lungo mare e al mercato.
L’imbarco per i traghetti è a soli 5 minuti di taxi (un po’ caro, ma a piedi bisogna attraversare un ponte trafficato senza marciapiede)
reviews.negatives: Materasso duro (ma è uno standard in Vietnam 😜)

reviews.title: Gần bờ sông và chợ
reviews.text:
Khi tôi vừa đến khách sạn nhân viên yêu cầu tôi nên hủy booking để được thanh toán trực tiếp giá ưu đãi. Nhưng tôi từ chối yêu cầu đó vì tôi không muốn Agoda phạt phí hũy phòng của tôi một cách vô lý.
Khách sạn có cho thuê xe gắn máy giá cả hợp lý và nhân viên khá nhiệt tình và thân thiện. Phòng sạch sẽ tiện nghi và mới.

reviews.title: Buona tappa prima di raggiungere la Cambogia
reviews.positives:
Accoglienza gentile e attenta. 
Ci hanno aiutato nell’acquisto di un biglietto per il bus che ci avrebbe portato oltre confine.
Colazione soddisfacente  aggiungendo 3 dollari. 
Il mercato circostante vi stupirà per la sua originalità, così come tutto il Vietnam in generale.
Consigliato per una tappa se volete raggiungere la Cambogia.
reviews.negatives: Il letto e il cuscino sono molto duri, ma questa è stata una costante in giro per il Vietnam.

reviews.title: ok !
reviews.text: Tốt, ok !

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: De prijs is zeer laag en toch is alles schoon.
reviews.negatives: De wifi was niet duidelijk en werkte soms niet.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Giá hợp lý, phòng ban đầu hơi nhỏ, xin đổi sang phòng có ban công thêm 100k cũng hợp lý, gần trung tâm gần bến tàu cao tốc, ăn uống đi lại cũng tiện

reviews.title: 服務良好，房間乾淨，設施完善，還會再來

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Thiết bị vật dụng mới
reviews.negatives: Khách sạn gì mà kiến không. Ngủ lại qua đêm mà hôm sau không có dọn phòng để nguyên như vậy

reviews.title: Phù hợp đi du lịch
reviews.text: Thoáng mát sạch sẽ

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Địa điểm gần PHà Thạnh Thới, đi chừng 3-5phut. Gần các điểm ăn hải sản tươi và giá tốt. Không gian bên ngoài KS thoáng. Rất thích.
reviews.negatives:
Mình đặt phòng có ban công để thoáng gió, Tuy nhiên, mình đến trễ so với kế hoạch do có bé nhỏ <12 tháng. Đúng ra KS nên gọi mình để check lại, mà kg gọi, khi đến nơi thì lại cho ở phòng khác, nên cũng kg hài lòng lắm. Mac dù nói cho phòng 2 giường đôi, nhưng mình lại thích phòng thoáng gió hơn, và theo mình giường đôi là hơi nhỏ
Góp ý: nếu Khách đến muộn hơn thời gian theo kế hoạch, thì gọi xác nhận lại để chính xác giữ phòng hay chuyển cho Khách khác.

reviews.title: Tuyệt
reviews.text: Nhiệt tính mến khách

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Bình thường
reviews.negatives: Quá ồn

reviews.title: Tốt trong tầm giá
reviews.text: Chất lượng tốt so với giá. Sạch sẽ, mới, địa điểm thuận tiện

reviews.title: Khách sạn Tốt - Booking giới thiệu chưa tốt !
reviews.negatives:
Booking nên viết cho rõ nội dung có hay không có ăn sáng . Chứ không thể dùng lời văn gây hiểu lầm cho khách như sau:
" Bữa sáng có chi phí là VND 70.000 mỗi người mỗi đêm." Nội dung này là quá thừa vì con số 70.000 không dựa trên cái gì cả!!!

reviews.title: Khách sạn nhỏ xinh có góc view đẹp nhìn ra cầu, pháo đài
reviews.text: Gia đình tôi đã ở đây cho kỳ nghỉ, khách sạn nhỏ xinh, phòng ốc còn mới, sạch sẽ, ngay chợ với nhiều lựa chọn ăn uống, dạo phố. Khách sạn có các cô nhân viên cực kì dễ thương, nhiệt tình, điểm trừ nhỏ là nơi đỗ ô tô còn hạn chế trong mùa lễ, nếu muốn an toàn bạn nên vào bãi gởi có thu phí ngay sát 1 bên. Sẽ còn quay lại.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Có chỗ đỗ xe, gần chợ
reviews.negatives: Nước yếu

reviews.title: Tốt
reviews.text: Ok

reviews.title: Cũng được
reviews.positives: Ngay khu trung tâm, ngay chợ cá, giá ok hơn các nhà nghỉ bên cạnh, dễ tìm
reviews.negatives: Giường chưa sạch làm, phòng mình ở có gián 😭.

reviews.title: Khách sạn nhiệt tình dễ thương
reviews.text: Khách sạn nhiệt tình dễ thương

reviews.title: Trải nghiệm tuyệt vời ở Hà Tiên
reviews.positives: Khách sạn ở vị trí trung tâm, có sân đậu ô tô rộng rãi, gần Chợ Cá, gần trung tâm nên nhiều quán ăn. Khách sạn rất sạch, nhân viên nhiệt tình, dễ thương, giá hợp lý.
reviews.negatives: Phòng mình đặt còn mới, rất sạch. Tuy nhiên không có giá treo áo quần trong phòng tắm cũng như bên ngoài phòng. Kệ để đồ choáng quá nên khó khăn khi cúi đầu xuống lavabo rửa mặt. Giá treo vòi hoa sen quá cao. Tivi lắp ở vị trí không nằm xem được, nên đổi chỗ Tivi và máy lạnh thì hay hơn. Hoặc nên nghiên cứu sắp xếp bố cục trong phòng lại cho hợp lý trong việc sử dụng. Nếu có thêm ấm đun nước nóng nữa để pha cà phê, trà nhâm nhi thì tốt quá. Góp ý của mình có tính chất cải thiện giúp cho những khách hàng khác có trải nghiệm tuyệt vời hơn và giúp KS nâng cao chất lượng, tiện nghi hơn.

reviews.title: Siisti hyvä hotelli
reviews.text: Henkilökunta oli auttavaista, joskin englannintaito ei kovin hyvä

reviews.title: Nên thử 1 lần
reviews.positives: Tốt
reviews.negatives: Lễ tân giao nhầm phòng chưa dọn, có đổi lại

reviews.title: Великолепно!
reviews.text: Действительно чистый номер. Очень тихий кондиционер. В ванной горячая вода. Девушки на ресепшене просто прекрасны. Очень внимательные и вежливые. Хорошо говорят по-английски, во всем стараются помочь. Мы им очень благодарны, за то, что они помогли нам купить билеты на остров Фукуок, подсказали где купить Симкарту и вызвали такси. В отеле можно заказать завтрак. Рекомендую этот отель

reviews.title: Great location lovely staff
reviews.text: Stayed at happy hotel ha tien for 1 night as transmitting to phu Quoc. Lovely and super friendly staff who arranged a cab for us and helped us during our stay. Room was clean, fresh, tidy and good aircon

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Th
reviews.positives:
- nhân viên vui vẻ, thân thiện
- Phòng y như hình đã book
- Phòng rất mới, sạch sẽ
- Khách sạn rất mới, mọi thứ đều sạch 
- Có máy lạnh, tivi, amenities, nước suối trong phòng miễn phí
- Khách sạn có bán đồ bơi, chỗ để xe rộng rãi, có thang máy.
- Khách sạn ngay trung tâm, đi đâu cũng dễ, sát bên chợ Hà Tiên, trước mặt khách sạn là bãi sân siêu rộng rãi, đậu xe khách 52 chỗ quá ư là đẹp

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Tuyệt
reviews.negatives: Không có

reviews.negatives: Không có

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Chỗ ở thoảng mát , sạch sẽ
reviews.negatives: Không

reviews.title: Все было просто хорошо
reviews.positives: Рядом с пирсами, прям напротив, рядом много заведений с морскими деликатесами, все живое, плавает, в 100 метрах рынок, поздний заезд без проблем, лифт, принадлежности, свежее белье

reviews.title: Все супер. Рекомендую.
reviews.positives:
Расположение хорошее, рядом недалеко рыночек и много всяких кафе в которые можно сходить и позавтракать, в самом номере  чисто, все принадлежности есть, кондиционер, телевизор, небольшой холодильник. 
Персонал приветливый, девушка в дальнейшем помогла нам даже купить билеты на паром до Фукуока
reviews.negatives: Немного непривычно что в номере нет окна. Но мы останавливались просто переночевать.

reviews.title: Hea koht 1-2 ööks
reviews.positives: Asukoht oli hea, ilus vaade akendest ja suur rõdu. Tuba suur ja puhas
reviews.negatives: Hommikul kostis liikluse müra ja kukkede kiremine tuppa

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Velmi vstřícná majitelka, pomohla nám koupit lístky na trajakt a zařídila odvoz do přístavu

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Manager helpful
reviews.negatives: Location

reviews.title: Good for one night, but don't hope to sleep in the morning...
reviews.positives: Cheap, the staff is nice, the location is quite good. Very nice shower with hot water, pressure, and clean.
reviews.negatives: No windows in the room, making it very claustrophobic (ok for 1 night). But the really bad part war, at 7am, there was some REALLY loud music, like nightclub volume level. It lasted for maybe 15-30 minutes. I really don't understand how you can have an hotel and simply not consider that some clients want to sleep later then 7am. Especially if you know they only have a ferry at 11:45, because you booked it for them...

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Close to superdong ferry terminal,  great views from the balcony for the enormous thunder/lightening storm at night 🤣. Also, hotel had a generator,  so even when the power went out across Ha Tien because of storm we still had air conditioning (thankyou!)
reviews.negatives: Could do with softer/more pillows on beds

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: The receptionist tried her best but it was still hard to communicate with her. She could offer only limited info but still managed to get me across the border to Cambodia

reviews.title: Don't expect anything fancy
reviews.positives: Good location, good price. Easy check in/out and helpful staff.
reviews.negatives:
Bed sucked, holes in linen, very uncomfortable. Small bathroom but the equipment was OK. The "window" was very small and opened on the inside of the hotel. 
Very loud construction noise early in the morning but that's not really the hotels fault.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Ok
reviews.negatives: Ok

reviews.title: Fine for a night
reviews.positives: Clean. Comfortable. Good staff. Secure parking
reviews.negatives: The balcony room picture when I booked looked nothing like my room. Noisy facing a busy road.

reviews.title: Great location for short stay before heading to Phu Quoc
reviews.positives:
We stayed just one night before heading to Phu Quoc but was a great location in the town and good value.

Staff were helpful and sorted us a taxi to the port.
reviews.negatives: Can’t complain!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Very friendly and helpful staff, right in the centre of town.
reviews.negatives: Sadly the room had a really damp smell, it stayed on our clothes for days after we left. It was also really noisy with lots of shouting early in the morning - I don’t know if it was staff or other guests, but it woke us up and carried on for a long time.

reviews.title: Fine while waiting for the boat to Phu Quoc
reviews.positives: Clean and comfy, helpful staff,
reviews.negatives: Popular with Viet tourists who shout, yell and scream along the corridor. The walls are thin.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
The staff were lovely, they were very helpful and even showed us some videos of sights we should see on our day trip we were planning to take on our bike. 

The place is good value for money. It is basic, but we were happy given the price. Its also not terribly loud, despite being close to town.
reviews.negatives: There's occasionally the smell of cigarette smoke in the room, but not enough to put us off staying.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: I had a few mosquitos in my room even though it had no windows.

reviews.title: Great location and friendly staff.
reviews.positives:
Friendly staff that made our family stay so enjoyable in Ha Tien.
Great recommendations from front of house staff as well; showed us all the local eateries to try. They were all a hit.
Air conditioning was very strong so that made our stay very pleasant.
Great location also, close to the markets.
reviews.negatives: TV channels were limited to local stations.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Good for an overnight stay. What it says on the tin. It is very easy to go to with the Futa bus and 10 min walk to the Cambodia border crossing departure office.
reviews.negatives: Wifi is not functional, there are too many routers on the same band, it keeps on disconnecting.

reviews.title: Okay hotel for a stopover
reviews.positives: Cheap hotel for one night, close to the harbor to catch the ferry. Comfortable, clean and big room. Staff helped me to find a taxi to the harbor.
reviews.negatives: I didn't get a response to my message before I went to the hotel asking them to help me out getting a taxi from the bus station to there. Staff didn't speak English so well. No card payment, no additional information provided beforehand about eating/drinking options around etc how I experienced it in other places.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Big room and good value

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Nice clean rooms and helpful staff.

reviews.title: Perfect stay for one night in Ha tien
reviews.positives: Very helpful staff. Staff helped me to organize logistics to cross the border to Cambodia,which went very smooth. Hotel is perfect for one night; clean, comfortable rooms and in a good location in town.
reviews.negatives: Liked everything.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Friendly receptionist, helpful. Same family organises the transfer to Kampot. 
Close to the river. Spacious room.
reviews.negatives: The hotel is called Hanh Phuc, Vietnamese for Happy.  A bit confusing when looking for the location.

reviews.title: Perfect for one night if getting the ferry.
reviews.positives: Simple, unpretentious, clean. Painless check in, strong AC, clean, right next to the ferry. For the price it's perfect. The WiFi is good and there was enough water provided (4x500ml)
reviews.negatives: Bed is not very comfortable, no food available.

reviews.title: Happy
reviews.positives: The owner speaks English at a high level, sorted out my bus ticket for Cambodia and anything else
reviews.negatives: Top floor is the best option

reviews.title: Comfortable and convenient
reviews.positives: Very clean, lift to each floor. Helpful friendly staff. Very handy for getting the ferry to phu quoc and good location for the town
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: It was clean, everything worked, the bed was comfortable
reviews.negatives: Nothing specific

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Stayed one night there before moving to Phu Quoc. Very central location, lots of restaurants and food hawkers there. Ferry terminal is opposite the river, however you need a ride to get there easily. I was happy in Happy Hotel!
reviews.negatives: none

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: We arrived really early in the morning and went to number 2 hotel not realizing there were 2 , they organized to fetch us and we were allowed to check in Early , extremely courteous and helpful , very friendly and so convenient for the ferry port for the boat to Phu Quoc . Everything worked great .
reviews.negatives: Nothing to dislike other than it would have been great to have a kettle in the room for a coffee in the morning.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
The staff is super helpful. Thank you to them!
Super nice deal if you plan a night in Ha Tien. Good location and amazing value for money.
Simple but clean room.
reviews.negatives: A bit noisy. It was not their fault but some guests were playing karaoke super loud in the room next to ours.

reviews.title: Loved our stopover at this site.
reviews.positives: Staff was so friendly and helpful.  Nice location.  Great value.

reviews.title: Excellent place
reviews.positives: Reception staff were amazing, we were given a free upgrade on the room too. Great location right in the town
reviews.negatives: The bed was not comfortable

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Very good location. Close to the city center. The room was quiet and clean. Very friendly staff, especially Mindy. They arranged transportation for me and recommended good restaurants. I recommend this hotel.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: all was great , hotel in the center of everywhere of this little town, worth to stay before rushing to Phu Quoc, what most people do, and it is pity

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The staff and location
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The staff were super friendly and supportive. The location was great.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Cleanliness, location

reviews.title: Great stay!
reviews.positives: The staff were so kind and helpful! They helped us organise an affordable bus to Ho Chi Minh City without a markup and we're there to help with any request we had at the time in English. There is an elevator with good aircon and tv in room.

reviews.title: Simple but perfectly done
reviews.positives: Clean, large rooms, better than expected for the price. Lovely staff.
